title: Swapping two cups — with a spare
problem: Cup a holds juice and cup b holds milk. Swap them, so cup a ends with milk and cup b ends with juice.
source:
a = "juice"
b = "milk"
temp = a
a = b
b = temp

trace.note: Cup a (the left cup) holds juice.
Cup b (the right cup) holds milk.
First, pour cup a's juice into a spare counter cup (temp). Now the juice is safe before we overwrite anything.
Pour cup b into cup a. Cup a is now milk. For a moment both a and b hold milk — but the juice is safe in the spare.
trace.checkpoint_prompt: Before you step: after `b = temp` runs, what will cup b hold? (Where did the juice go?)

trace.note: Pour the spare cup (temp) into cup b. Cup b now holds juice. The swap worked: a has milk, b has juice. The spare cup saved the day.
